questions.question_text: Answer the following questions. . CO Mapping a Explain the ‘Law of Diminishing Marginal Utility’ 2.5 b Site various risks associated with the Client and Design Consultants in a typical high rise residential project 2.5 c Explain the term ‘Arbitration’ 2.5 d What is the difference between ‘General Condition of Contract’ and ‘Specific Condition of Contract’ 2.5 e Explain advantages and key limitation of Bar Charts 2.5 f What is the major difference between CPM and PERT 2.5 g List down various stakeholders of Noida International Airport 2.5 h Briefly explain the term ‘project phasing’ 2.5
Explain the project life cycle from Inception Phase to Post- Construction Phase through the example of New Parliament Building . 10
Taking up the example of LAVASA Lake City , explain the typical functions of a Project Controls Department in a city development project. 10
Name two Project Scheduling Software and two Document Administration/ Management Software. Brief explain their silent features. 10
Briefly explain various project management tools and techniques available for the architectural design professionals. 10
Citing relevant example explain the difference between ‘Change’ and a ‘Rework’. 10
List and explain any two common types of Public-Private Partnership contracts used in infrastructure projects in India. 10
With the help of a neat diagram, explain the various Forms of International Business. 10
Discuss various factors affecting the projects exports from India. 10
